rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §30.103, which governs a juvenile justice job training MOU. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The Texas Juvenile Justice Department with the assistance of the Texas Workforce Commission and the Texas Workforce Investment Council shall by rule adopt a memorandum of understanding
_note: No conflict; provisions address entirely distinct policy areas.
